mapper.sql: id, user_id, inventory_id, item_id, price, status, is_response_to_buy, target_buy_order_id, expire_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sell_order ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sell_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sell_order WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sell_order WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sell_order WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY price ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sell_order SET price = #{price}, status = #{status}, is_response_to_buy = #{isResponseToBuy}, buy_order_id = #{buyOrderId}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sell_order WHERE expire_time < NOW() AND status = 1
